is set to become the first astronaut of Malayali origin to travel to space as he embarks on his maiden mission to the International Space Station (ISS). A NASA astronaut, physician, engineer, and former SpaceX flight surgeon, Menon's remarkable journey is a proud moment for Kerala and India.
